title: Crispy Spanish Tofu Fritters
description: A savory, crispy brunch treat featuring crunchy tofu fritters seasoned with sea salt, smoked paprika, and a bright pickle garnish.
instructions: Press the tofu for 20 minutes to remove excess moisture, then crumble it into small chunks.
In a bowl, whisk together chickpea flour, cornmeal, sea salt, pepper, smoked paprika, garlic powder, onion powder, liquid smoke, and soy sauce until smooth.
Fold the crumbled tofu into the batter, ensuring each piece is coated. Let the mixture rest for 5 minutes.
Heat olive oil in a non-stick skillet over medium heat (about 350°F / 175°C) until shimmering.
Drop spoonfuls of the tofu mixture into the skillet, flattening them slightly with the back of a spatula.
Cook each fritter for 3-4 minutes per side, or until golden brown and crispy, checking the internal temperature reaches 160°F (71°C).
Transfer the fritters to a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve hot, topped with a spoonful of diced pickled red onions and a drizzle of extra soy sauce if desired.
